summary: Replayed ADR 0262 from refreshed mainline release 0.177.95 using committed source a6d327e73c210137b0f6ede8e202b560d3335ebc after confirming origin/main remained at 626c1a76b920c12f977b3edc031862cbd22376e8, re-verifying the mail-platform prerequisite, the repo-managed Keycloak runtime clients, the private OpenFGA runtime and delegated authorization bootstrap, and the shared API gateway publication so delegated ServerClaw authorization is now authoritative on main.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest tests/test_openfga_postgres_role.py tests/test_openfga_runtime_role.py tests/test_serverclaw_authz.py tests/test_keycloak_runtime_role.py tests/test_api_gateway_runtime_role.py tests/test_generate_platform_vars.py -q` passed on the synchronized tree, and `make syntax-check-mail-platform`, `make syntax-check-keycloak`, `make syntax-check-openfga`, and `make syntax-check-api-gateway` all passed on the final branch state.

`make converge-mail-platform env=production` succeeded from committed source `a6d327e73c210137b0f6ede8e202b560d3335ebc` with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=190 changed=8 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=36`, `monitoring-lv3 : ok=154 changed=0 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=20`, and `proxmox_florin : ok=73 changed=0 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=33`.

`make converge-keycloak env=production` succeeded with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=175 changed=0 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=38`, `monitoring-lv3 : ok=17 changed=0 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=1`, `nginx-lv3 : ok=39 changed=3 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=7`, `postgres-lv3 : ok=51 changed=0 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=14`, and `proxmox_florin : ok=219 changed=0 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=105`.

`make converge-openfga env=production` succeeded with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=256 changed=5 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=69`, `localhost : ok=2 changed=1 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=0`, `postgres-lv3 : ok=51 changed=0 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=14`, and `proxmox_florin : ok=41 changed=4 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=16`; that replay also passed the repo-managed delegated authorization bootstrap assertion.

`curl -fsS -H "Authorization: Bearer $(cat /Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.local/openfga/preshared-key.txt)" http://100.64.0.1:8014/stores` returned the `serverclaw-authz` store, and `python3 scripts/serverclaw_authz.py verify --config config/serverclaw-authz/bootstrap.json --openfga-url http://100.64.0.1:8014 --openfga-preshared-key-file /Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.local/openfga/preshared-key.txt --keycloak-url http://10.10.10.20:8091` returned `verification_passed: true` with `tuple_count: 12`, the declared operator and runtime principals, and all six expected checks passed.

`make converge-api-gateway env=production` succeeded with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=285 changed=111 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=39`, preserving the published `/v1/openfga` route on the shared authenticated gateway.

`curl -fsS https://api.lv3.org/healthz` returned `{"status":"ok"}`; the authenticated `https://api.lv3.org/v1/platform/services` response listed the `openfga` service with `gateway_prefix: /v1/openfga` and internal URL `http://100.64.0.1:8014`; and `https://api.lv3.org/v1/openfga/healthz` returned the canonical `AUTH_INSUFFICIENT_ROLE` envelope for `service-account-lv3-agent-hub` with `HTTP_STATUS=403`, proving the route is live and correctly role-gated instead of missing.

`./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards workstream-surfaces data-models generated-docs`, `uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/canonical_truth.py --check`, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python3 scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate`, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python3 scripts/platform_manifest.py --check`, `git diff --check`, and `make pre-push-gate` all passed on the final branch tree before merge.

notes: This receipt supersedes `2026-03-29-adr-0262-openfga-keycloak-live-apply` after origin/main advanced to release `0.177.94` and the synchronized mainline replay was refreshed on top of that baseline.

The authoritative replay used source commit `a6d327e73c210137b0f6ede8e202b560d3335ebc` after restoring the `serverclaw-runtime` Keycloak client contract and verification flow that drifted during the latest-main merge.
The synchronized replay justifies the platform-version bump from `0.130.62` to `0.130.63` while repository version `0.177.95` remains the integrated automation and documentation release for ADR 0262.
